MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher R. Ambrose (503-222-0552) for Plaintiff/Moving party INDEPENDENT BANK.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF INDEPENDENT BANK's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES is GRANTED in the amount of $38,697.50. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Fair Value And Entry Of Deficiency Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 726(B); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Ambrose (503-222-0552) of Ambrose Law Group for Plaintiff/Moving party INDEPENDENT BANK via CourtCall.
H.F. Layton (925-240-1040) of H.F. Layton Law Office for Defendant/opposing party ALAN M. ZNEIMER, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE REVOCABLE TRUST DECLARATION OF ALAN M. ZNEIMER AND ANN Y. ZNEIMER, DATED 4/30/04.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Plaintiff's counsel submits to the tentative ruling. Defense counsel argues, cites CCP 7266 re: evidentiary hearing. Argued. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF INDEPENDENT BANK's Motion For Determination Of Fair Value And Entry Of Deficiency Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 726(B) is GRANTED. Plaintiff is entitled to deficiency judgment in the amount of $112,069.47. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
